title: NZ Government Web Accessibility Standard 1.2
description: Mandatory standard requiring all NZ public service departments and Executive branch agencies to conform web pages (public and internal) to WCAG 2.2 Level AA, effective 17 March 2025. Defines scope, requirements, exemptions, and assessment obligations for web accessibility compliance.
